S

setMessage(String) - Method in class gui.components.ConfirmDeleteModal
Updates the message text displayed in the modal body to describe the specific action being confirmed.
setOnCancel(Runnable) - Method in class gui.components.ConfirmDeleteModal
Registers a callback to execute when the cancel button is clicked.
setOnConfirm(Runnable) - Method in class gui.components.ConfirmDeleteModal
Registers a callback to execute when the confirm button is clicked.
show() - Method in class gui.components.ConfirmDeleteModal
Displays the modal by sizing it to match the window content dimensions, centering the modal card, and opening it as a top-layer overlay via BaseWindow.openModal(BaseComp).
